vectormodelR 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Mosquito Alert Modeling Pipeline

Aggregate Mosquito Alert + GBIF occurrence counts by GADM administrative level

Source: R/get_vector_counts.R
get_vector_counts.Rd

Spatially joins Mosquito Alert (MA) and GBIF occurrence points to GADM polygons and returns counts by admin name at the chosen level, plus totals.

Usage

get_vector_counts(
  iso3,
  level = 2,
  gadm = NULL,
  gbif_tbl = NULL,
  malert_sf = NULL,
  malert_source = "github",
  taxon_key = NULL,
  gbif_clip_to_perimeter = FALSE,
  gbif_save_outputs = FALSE,
  crs = 4326,
  join_predicate = sf::st_within,
  keep_unmatched = FALSE
)

Arguments

iso3

Character ISO3 code (e.g., "MEX", "JAM").

level

Integer requested GADM level (0 = country, 1 = region, 2 = district, ...).

gadm

Optional sf polygon layer for the chosen GADM level. If NULL, fetched via vectormodelR::get_gadm_data(iso3, level).

gbif_tbl

Optional data.frame/tibble of GBIF occurrences. If NULL, fetched via vectormodelR::get_gbif_data().

malert_sf

Optional sf POINT layer for Mosquito Alert occurrences. If NULL, fetched via vectormodelR::get_malert_data().

malert_source

Character passed to vectormodelR::get_malert_data(source = ...). Default: "github".

taxon_key

Optional vector of GBIF taxon key passed to vectormodelR::get_gbif_data().

gbif_clip_to_perimeter

Logical passed to vectormodelR::get_gbif_data().

gbif_save_outputs

Logical passed to vectormodelR::get_gbif_data().

crs

Integer EPSG for point creation / joining. Default 4326 (WGS84).

join_predicate

Spatial predicate for join. Default sf::st_within. You can set sf::st_intersects if you prefer edge-inclusion.

keep_unmatched

Logical. If TRUE, includes an "UNMATCHED" bucket for points that do not fall inside polygons. Default FALSE (drops NAs).

Value

A tibble with columns:

  • admin_name : the selected name column at the level (e.g., NAME_2)

  • malert_count

  • gbif_count

  • total

  • iso3

  • level_used : actual level used after fallback

  • name_col : which NAME_* column was used

Details

If the requested GADM level is not available for the given ISO3, the function falls back to the highest available GADM level.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
counts <- get_vector_counts(iso3 = "MEX", level = 2)
counts <- get_vector_counts(iso3 = "JAM", level = 4) # falls back if 4 unavailable
} # }
